blocks.html: A class is a blueprint for creating objects. It bundles data (attributes) and behavior (methods) together. __init__ runs automatically when a new object is created.

blocks.label: Run Code

blocks.html: Each object made from a class keeps its own separate data. Making two dogs doesn't mix up their names.

blocks.label: Run Code

blocks.html: Create your own class called Robot with a name attribute and a greet() method that prints something friendly. Then make two different robots and call greet() on each.
